bullets: House church believers in China facing government orders to cease online prayer meetings and teaching, with authorities citing religious regulations.
Christians in Mozambique grieving the targeted killing of a church leader and seeking justice amid ongoing threats against religious figures.
Civilians across Lebanon, including residents of the largely emptied southern city, facing ongoing airstrikes, evacuation orders, and destroyed infrastructure with no safe path home.
Palestinians in Gaza unable to access medical care abroad as crossing restrictions persist and local healthcare infrastructure remains destroyed, with over 16,500 patients affected.
Civilians across Iran, Israel, and surrounding regions caught in escalating ballistic missile exchanges and airstrikes as a fragile ceasefire collapses and further escalation is threatened.
Palestinians in the occupied West Bank facing ongoing settler violence and civilian harm amid a pattern of security force inaction documented by the United Nations.
Palestinian former detainees, including women and minors, describing systematic abuse, sexual violence, and severe mistreatment in Israeli detention facilities.
Civilians in Sudan facing worsening humanitarian crisis as drone strikes on bridges and roads cut off aid delivery routes across the country.
Women and protesters in Afghanistan facing violent crackdown by authorities over dress code enforcement, with multiple deaths and detentions reported.
Civilians in Bolivia amid a military crackdown on protests over a severe economic crisis, with at least 10 people killed since unrest began.
Residents of Pakistan-administered Kashmir caught in deadly clashes between protesters and security forces, leaving at least 11 dead and over 70 injured.
Over 300 young Kurdish men from Iraq kidnapped and tortured by a militia in Libya while attempting to migrate, with families extorted and at least one confirmed death.
Migrants and foreign nationals across South Africa facing anti-immigrant violence, business lootings, and forced repatriation, including Nigerian nationals whose children are being kept from school.
Protesters and residents in a Kenyan town facing repeated deadly clashes with police over a proposed foreign military medical facility near their community.
French families and child abuse survivors amid grief and public outcry over the murder of an 11-year-old girl and the failure of authorities to act on prior abuse allegations.
Residents of Northern Ireland amid rising tensions, street unrest, and fears of renewed community violence following a knife attack and far-right mobilisation.
Approximately 20,000 displaced residents in the Philippines facing urgent needs for shelter, food, and basic supplies following a powerful earthquake in Mindanao.
Communities across western Cuba shaken by a significant offshore earthquake, with thousands of felt reports and uncertainty about damage and casualties.
Populations of Honduras, El Salvador, Nicaragua, and Guatemala in the path of Tropical Storm Cristina and the flooding and destruction it may bring to vulnerable communities.
Hundreds of thousands of people in eastern DR Congo amid a deadly Ebola outbreak with over 550 cases and 101 deaths, hampered by the absence of an approved vaccine or treatment.
